The '''capture of Duro''' occurred in [[10 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]],<ref name="TEA" /> during [[Operation Shadow Hand]] in the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], when [[Vice Admiral/Legends|Vice Admiral]] [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon]] led an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] fleet to capture the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Duro/Legends|Duro]] from [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] forces. However, Pellaeon's flagship [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Chimaera/Legends|''Chimaera'']] was heavily damaged in the attack, with many of Pellaeon's officers [[Death/Legends|killed]] in the process. Pellaeon was forced to ally himself with [[High Admiral]] [[Treuten Teradoc]] in the aftermath of the battle.<ref name="TNEC" />
